attachments.name: Step Passed: Valid vaccination record is created for '9461267665' and Disease Type 'FLU' with recorded date as '2023-01-01'
Step Passed: Send a search request with 'GET' method with valid NHS Number '9461267665' and Disease Type 'FLU' and Date From '2023-01-01' and Date To '2023-06-04'
Step Passed: The request will be successful with the status code '200'
Step Passed: The occurrenceDateTime of the immunization events should be within the Date From and Date To range
